RESOURCES
Attention Tactics
The fourth of The 5 Core Habits - Attention. Learn the
tactics to focus your Attention.
Attention Tactics
- Get a new phone number
- Remove FB app from your phone
- Remove Messenger notifications
- Clean your space
- Intolerance for Disruption/Anxieties
- No split focus. Only ONE opportunity at a time
- Do less. Say “NO” more
- Masking stressors
- Refunds and loud customers
